name: seed-and-lexical
statements: CREATE TABLE seed_releases (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (length(id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), source_manifest_hash TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(source_manifest_hash) = 64 AND source_manifest_hash NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'), catalog_hash TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(catalog_hash) = 64 AND catalog_hash NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'), license_notice_hash TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(license_notice_hash) = 64 AND license_notice_hash NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'), generated_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (generated_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR generated_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), installed_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (installed_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR installed_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), app_version TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(app_version) BETWEEN 1 AND 64), food_count INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(food_count) = 'integer' AND food_count >= 0), alias_count INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(alias_count) = 'integer' AND alias_count >= 0), portion_count INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(portion_count) = 'integer' AND portion_count >= 0))

CREATE TABLE seed_release_sources (release_id TEXT NOT NULL, data_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (data_type IN ('foundation','survey')), dataset_version TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(dataset_version) BETWEEN 1 AND 256), source_url TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(source_url) BETWEEN 1 AND 1024), artifact_hash TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(artifact_hash) = 64 AND artifact_hash NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'), artifact_byte_length INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(artifact_byte_length) = 'integer' AND artifact_byte_length > 0), license_id TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (license_id = 'CC0-1.0'), attribution TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(attribution) BETWEEN 1 AND 1024), retrieved_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (retrieved_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR retrieved_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), PRIMARY KEY (release_id, data_type), FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES seed_releases(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)

CREATE TABLE seed_release_foods (release_id TEXT NOT NULL, food_id TEXT NOT NULL, food_revision_id TEXT NOT NULL, source_id TEXT NOT NULL, stable_source_key TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(stable_source_key) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), PRIMARY KEY (release_id, food_id), UNIQUE (release_id, stable_source_key), FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES seed_releases(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, FOREIGN KEY (food_id, food_revision_id) REFERENCES food_revisions(food_id, id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, FOREIGN KEY (source_id) REFERENCES food_sources(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)

CREATE TABLE seed_release_aliases (release_id TEXT NOT NULL, alias_id TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (release_id, alias_id), FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES seed_releases(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, FOREIGN KEY (alias_id) REFERENCES food_aliases(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)

CREATE TABLE seed_release_portions (release_id TEXT NOT NULL, portion_id TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (release_id, portion_id), FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES seed_releases(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, FOREIGN KEY (portion_id) REFERENCES food_portions(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)

CREATE TABLE seed_catalog_state (singleton INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (singleton = 1), active_release_id TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (active_release_id) REFERENCES seed_releases(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)

CREATE TABLE food_search_index_state (singleton INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (singleton = 1), schema_version INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (schema_version > 0), active_release_id TEXT, rebuilt_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (rebuilt_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR rebuilt_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), FOREIGN KEY (active_release_id) REFERENCES seed_releases(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)
CREATE INDEX foods_normalized_name_id ON foods(normalized_name, id)
CREATE INDEX food_aliases_normalized_alias_food_id ON food_aliases(normalized_alias, food_id)
CREATE INDEX seed_release_foods_food_id ON seed_release_foods(food_id, release_id)
